title: Bedrock Visualization
description: A visualization of Minecraft BEDROCK EDITION
body:
![Bedrock Visualization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10c6a42b4ab3d9a73e8d522562c23c897c2946a6.png)
### _ENG_
A **simple modpack** that gives the look of **_Minecraft Bedrock_** on a different edition. This mod is **_still in development_**, but it will be cool :)
### _RU_
Простой **модпак**, который дает вид _**Minecraft Bedrock**_ на другом издании. Данный мод ещё **_в разработке_**, но он будет крутым :)
#

# 
![Faq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e05171da4d5b51c33f3d20a6e3075658b551ed5b.png)
## Раздел в разработке | Section under development
### Есть ли поддержка пиратки? | Is there support for pirated Minecraft?
50/50. Most of the functions require a license. WE DO NOT SUPPORT PIRACY
### Will the project be open source? When will the source code be released?
The source code will be released at the first release, the project is still in development.
# 

![BUG HUNTER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2085dddf5c39419b7976cb3c9b3327d7bf952f4f.png)
![999](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f601cff1e0229c60533affc3e363749d5aa07b5.png)


Find a bug and submit in a email kz244qyov@mozmail.com (NO REWARD, THIS IS TO HELP THE PROJECT)

I ACCEPT LETTERS (COMPLAINTS) BEFORE THE FIRST RELEASE. **GOOD LUCK!** 🍀



**_Minecraft Bedrock is a trademark of Mojang, MY MOD PACK DOES NOT RELATED TO IT, it is not a Microsoft product._**

**_Minecraft Bedrock является торговой маркой Моджанг, МОЙ МОДПАК К НЕМУ НЕ ОТНОСИТСЯ, это не продукт Microsoft._**
